# Aveliq

> Signal over noise. Independent analysis on AI, finance, fintech, crypto, and business.

Aveliq is an independent media publication covering the forces shaping technology and markets. Coverage focuses on clear, analytical explanation rather than hype — artificial intelligence, financial markets, digital assets, business strategy, and fintech.

## Categories
- [AI](https://aveliq.net/category/ai): Artificial intelligence, LLMs, and automation.
- [Finance](https://aveliq.net/category/finance): Monetary policy, capital markets, and macro.
- [Crypto](https://aveliq.net/category/crypto): Digital assets and institutional adoption.
- [Business](https://aveliq.net/category/business): Corporate strategy, venture capital, and startups.
- [Fintech](https://aveliq.net/category/fintech): Payments, banking-as-a-service, and embedded finance.

## About
- [About Aveliq](https://aveliq.net/about): Editorial approach and transparency.
- [Newsletter](https://aveliq.net/newsletter): Weekly analysis on AI, finance, and fintech.
